abstract_skeleton: We model future video state as trace-conditioned semantic fields rather than RGB generation or tracker post-processing. STWM rolls out future trace units and semantic prototype fields from observed video/trace/semantic memory, using a copy-gated residual transition for semantic changes and a belief readout for identity association utilities.
experiments: belief association / reacquisition / planning-lite / counterfactual utilities
introduction: Trace-first future state is a compact physical substrate.
Observed semantic memory should persist unless dynamics imply change.
STWM outputs future trace + semantic prototype fields under free rollout.
Mixed VSPW+VIPSeg validation shows changed-state gains while preserving stable semantics.
limitations: Prototype semantic space is not full RGB generation.
LODO cross-dataset remains appendix/future work unless run.
VIPSeg effect size is smaller than VSPW.
preferred_title: STWM: A Semantic-Trace World Model with Belief Filtering for Future Identity Association
title_options: STWM: A Semantic-Trace World Model with Belief Filtering for Future Identity Association
Semantic Trace World Models for Future Identity Association
Future Semantic Trace Fields with Copy-Gated Residual Memory
